message:
test(color-types): expand from 63 to 132 tests for color type conversions and operations (wa-3ig6o)

Add 69 new tests covering: SrgbaTuple to_srgb_u8, HSL operations
(to_hsla, from_hsla roundtrip, to_laba, saturate, saturate_fixed,
lighten_fixed, adjust_hue_fixed, complement_ryb, adjust_hue_fixed_ryb),
ToDynamic/FromDynamic, LinearRgba with_rgba vs with_srgba, oklaba
roundtrip, ensure_contrast_ratio scenarios, linear_u8_to_srgb8
boundaries and monotonicity, SrgbaPixel conversions, Hash/Eq
consistency, contrast ratio symmetry, delta_e symmetry, and extensive
FromStr edge cases (HSL edge values, rgb:/rgba: variants, CSS
functions, hex digit lengths, invalid inputs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
